title: Biden exited 2024 presidential race but remains president | Fact check
shortDescription: Biden said dropping out of the presidential race would allow him to focus on fulfilling his term, which ends in January 2025.

title: Could Hillary Clinton replace Biden?
shortDescription: Biden bowed out of the presidential race and endorsed Kamala Harris, but other names are being suggested. Could Hillary Clinton be one of them?

title: What is VP Kamala Harris' stance on the war in Gaza?
shortDescription: President Joe Biden announced he will not seek reelection and named Vice President Kamala Harris as his successor. What is her stance on Israel?

title: At Vance rally, Ohio senator references civil war to 'save' country
shortDescription: State Sen. George Lang referenced civil war at JD Vance's first hometown rally in Middletown, Ohio.

title: Harris makes first speech since Biden endorsement
shortDescription: Kamala Harris thanked President Biden for his service to the nation in her first speech since receiving his endorsement for the Democratic ticket.

title: A look back at Joe Biden's career
shortDescription: Joe Biden started his political career in 1970, first as a Republican. He became a lifelong Democrat when he won his Senate seat two years later.

title: Trump rally-goers prefer Biden over Harris as opponent: See video
shortDescription: Donald Trump asked a rally crowd in Grand Rapids, Michigan who they would prefer to run against to win the election. They booed for VP Kamala Harris.

title: Bush, Biden, Clinton not included on ticket for first time in decades
shortDescription: President Joe Biden's decision to drop out of the race could mean end of run with a Bush, Clinton or Biden on every presidential ballot since 1980.

title: Trump polls supporters: Harris or Biden?
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump proposed a "poll" to rally goers in Michigan, asking them who he should run against, Joe Biden or Kamala Harris.

title: Global leaders react to Biden ending campaign
shortDescription: President Joe Biden has ended his reelection campaign, just months ahead of the general election. He has endorsed his Vice President Kamala Harris.

title: With Biden gone, what's next for the upcoming presidential debate?
shortDescription: As the general election draws nearer, so too does the next presidential debate. But with Biden exiting the race, the debate may not go on as planned.

title: Biden drops out: Top moments that led to the decision
shortDescription: President Joe Biden announced Sunday he is ending his bid for reelection. We look back at how it happened, starting from the June 27 debate.

title: Democrats' election gamble scraps playbook for what's next
shortDescription: Democrats may not be united behind Kamala Harris, at least not yet, but they are united by this: A desire to defeat Donald Trump.

title: Joe Biden drops out of 2024 presidential race | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: How is the Trump campaign responding after Biden's decision? Is America ready for a President Kamala Harris? It's all on The Excerpt.

title: Global praise for Biden as he quits race. But also some relief?
shortDescription: Allies of the United States lined up to thank Joe Biden for his years of service after he dropped out of the 2024 presidential election.

title: Harris vs Trump: Latest news on drastic change to 2024 election
shortDescription: Americans wake up to an upended 2024 election race after Joe Biden dropped out and endorsed VP Kamala Harris in the fight to beat Donald Trump.
